note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. — ade-agent-bunny (Ade: Agent Bunny, SR/Iron/Supporter/B2). MODEL: S1 blk1 = allies casterAtkPct 15.2 dur 5 on her full-charge landings — no full-charge trigger in types.ts, so `shotFired` PROXY (⚑1: every SR trigger pull assumed a landed full-charge hit within effective range; range condition assumed always-true since the engine force-sets noRange). S1 blk2 Spy Lens (self Min Effective Range ▲4.44% ×10 stacks, 5s) = inert range stat (prior 2, engine noRange universal) → unmodeled; but its STACK COUNT gates S2 blk2, see ⚑2. S2 blk1 = allies pierceDamagePct 18.36 dur 5 on full-charge, same shotFired proxy (kept though pierceDamagePct only feeds Damage Up for pierce-tagged attackers — she IS one via hasPierce, so her own 18.36 + burst 10.13 self-feed). S2 blk2 ('only if Spy Lens at max stacks': Gains Pierce continuous + ATK ▲16% continuous) = top-level hasPierce:true + passive self atkPct 16, STEADY-STATE assumed-satisfied (⚑2: derived ramp ≈15–16s to 10 stacks at ~1.37s/full-charge incl. one reload; held thereafter because re-application refresh keeps stacks alive across the 2.35s reload < 5s stack duration — standard NIKKE stack-refresh ASSUMED; always-on overstates the first ~15s ≈ 9% of fight for the 16% ATK + Pierce tag). BURST (burstCast, B2 cd20) = allies attackDamagePct 55.04 + pierceDamagePct 10.13, dur 10; self Min Effective Range ▲55.56% inert range stat → unmodeled (hard-rule-1 check done: range buffs change the effective-range band, NOT shots fired — no shot-count channel). ⚑3 MANDATORY cadence tuple: chargeFrames 60 + default 22f bolt gap (noBoltRecovery NOT set — never unmeasured), reloadFrames 141, ammo 6 → ~1.37s/shot, ~10.6s mag cycle; verify rounds/min + reload gap + autofire from any focus video. No heal/shield/DEF/HP/hit-rate/reload/ammo/recurring-damage lines in kit (hard rules 1–5 clean).

skill1: Spy Lens: Minimum Effective Range ▲ 4.44%, stacks up to 10 time(s) and lasts for 5 sec.

caveats: skill1: team ATK (15.2% of caster ATK) is keyed to a shotFired proxy for 'landing Full Charge attacks within effective range' — assumes every trigger pull is a landed full charge (⚑ unmeasured)
skill2: 'Spy Lens at max stacks' gate modeled as always-satisfied steady state (passive ATK +16% + Pierce) — real onset is a ~15s stack ramp (⚑ unmeasured)
skill2: team Pierce Damage +18.36% rides the same shotFired full-charge proxy (⚑ unmeasured)
cadence: SR bolt-gap (22f) + chargeFrames 60 + reloadFrames 141 are datamine defaults — verify autofire/rounds-per-minute/reload from video (⚑ unmeasured)
